name: Dailymotion Video Platform API
what_it_does: Dailymotion REST API for video hosting, publishing, management, and monetization. Enables AI agents to manage video upload and publishing workflow for content distribution automation, handle video metadata and SEO optimization for content discoverability, access video analytics and audience measurement for content performance tracking, retrieve monetization and ad insertion management for video revenue automation, manage player embedding and customization for website video integration, handle content moderation and compliance for brand safety automation, access live streaming management for broadcast event automation, retrieve video transcription and subtitle management for accessibility compliance, manage channel and playlist organization for content library automation, and integrate Dailymotion with CMS, social media, and advertising platforms.
use_cases: Publishing videos from content management agents
Tracking video performance from analytics agents
Managing ad monetization from video revenue agents
Embedding players from website publishing agents
not_for: Private enterprise video without public distribution needs
Internal training or knowledge base video without public sharing
Live events requiring ultra-low latency streaming
best_when: A media company, publisher, or content creator wants AI agents to automate video publishing, metadata management, analytics, and monetization on Dailymotion.
avoid_when: COPYRIGHT AND DMCA RISK: Automated video upload without content rights verification creates DMCA takedown exposure; Dailymotion's ContentID-equivalent system may remove monetization or content; automated upload workflows must verify content ownership and licensing before publication. Age-restricted content — automated publishing of content that may be COPPA-regulated (children's content) must comply with COPPA requirements; YouTube/Dailymotion content directed at children requires special data handling. Brand safety for advertisers — automated ad insertion in programmatic monetization may place ads against brand-unsafe content; automated content management must implement content safety classification before monetization enabling.

auth.notes: Dailymotion uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Documentation at developers.dailymotion.com. Paris, France HQ. Founded 2005. Owned by Vivendi (since 2015). 400M+ monthly active users. 3rd largest video platform globally behind YouTube and Vimeo. Competes with YouTube, Vimeo, and Brightcove for video hosting and monetization.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for creators; enterprise monetization requires partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share for monetization; enterprise hosting partnerships
pricing.notes: Paris, France. Founded 2005. Vivendi-owned. 400M+ monthly active users. 3rd largest video platform. Competes with YouTube and Vimeo for video hosting.

performance.rate_limits: OAuth token-based rate limits; 100-500 requests/hour depending on tier

known_agent_gotchas: DMCA COPYRIGHT ENFORCEMENT: Automated video upload must verify content ownership and licensing; Dailymotion's automated rights management can remove monetization or content without notice for rights violations

COPPA children's content compliance — automated publishing of content directed at children requires COPPA compliance including restricted behavioral advertising and data collection; content classification must precede monetization enabling
Rate limit strictness — Dailymotion API rate limits are enforced per OAuth token; batch upload automation must implement exponential backoff and rate limit header monitoring to avoid 429 errors

Video processing latency — uploaded videos require transcoding before availability; automated publish workflows must handle async video processing status via webhooks or polling before marking content as live
GDPR data residency — Dailymotion (Paris HQ, Vivendi) processes EU user data under GDPR; automated analytics that process EU viewer data require GDPR-compliant consent management
Monetization partner program requirements — programmatic monetization requires Dailymotion partner program eligibility; automated monetization enabling must validate partner status before insertion
agent_readiness.security_notes: Video platform. GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU/US. Video content and viewer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Video platform. GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. EU/US. Video and viewer data.
